kw.name: Prepare Results Directory
Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.
Ensure results output directory exists.

kw.name: Run Renode Script
Get Renode Path
Run Keyword And Return Status
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Renode executable not found. Set RENODE_PATH env var or install Renode at ${RENODE_APP_PATH}
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Resolve Renode executable path.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.
Run a script from simulation/scripts and return process result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Run Renode Script
Get Renode Path
Run Keyword And Return Status
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Renode executable not found. Set RENODE_PATH env var or install Renode at ${RENODE_APP_PATH}
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Resolve Renode executable path.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.
Run a script from simulation/scripts and return process result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Extract Result Value
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create File
kw.doc: Creates a file with the given content and encoding.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.arg: msg=Failed to extract key '${key}'. Python stderr: ${result.stderr}
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Strip String
kw.doc: Remove leading and/or trailing whitespaces from the given string.
Parse RESULT key=value from script output using Python helper.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Run Renode Script
Get Renode Path
Run Keyword And Return Status
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Renode executable not found. Set RENODE_PATH env var or install Renode at ${RENODE_APP_PATH}
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Resolve Renode executable path.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.
Run a script from simulation/scripts and return process result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: No Operation
kw.doc: Does absolutely nothing.
